pipes.areas: Trinkwasserinstallation, Heizungsbau, Klimatechnik, Industrielle Anlagen, Schiffbau
advList: Keine Korrosion: 100% resistent gegen Lochfraß und Rost.
Geringer Druckverlust: Die extrem glatte Innenfläche minimiert Reibung und spart Pumpenenergie.
Lange Lebensdauer: Garantiert über 50 Jahre wartungsfrei im Dauereinsatz.
Geräuschreduktion: Hervorragende Schalldämmung gegen Fließgeräusche.
Hygienisch: Erfüllt strengste internationale Trinkwassernormen (DVGW, KIWA).
pipes.seoText: Unsere Hochleistungsrohre werden in Waldsolms nach höchsten Qualitätsstandards gefertigt. Die Materialkombination PP-R und PP-RCT sorgt für außergewöhnliche Temperatur- und Druckbeständigkeit. Egal ob in der Haustechnik, im industriellen Anlagenbau oder bei komplexen Kühlsystemen – dieses Rohrsystem liefert maximale Sicherheit und Effizienz. Die einfache und sichere Schweißtechnik garantiert absolut leckagefreie Verbindungen.

advList: Homogene Verschweißung: Rohr und Fitting verschmelzen zu einer untrennbaren Einheit.
Keine Dichtungen nötig: Die dauerhafte Verbindung benötigt keine fehleranfälligen O-Ringe.
Einfache Montage: Schnelle und sichere Verarbeitung auf der Baustelle.
Voller Durchfluss: Keine Querschnittsverengung, wodurch der Systemdruck erhalten bleibt.
Chemische Beständigkeit: Resistent gegen eine Vielzahl aggressiver Medien.
fittings.seoText: Formteile von K-Aqua sind das Bindeglied für zuverlässige Rohrnetze. Gefertigt in Deutschland, bieten diese Fittings höchste Präzision und Maßhaltigkeit. Die Verschweißungstechnik (Muffenschweißen) dauert nur wenige Sekunden und kühlt zu einer Verbindung ab, die genauso stark ist wie das Rohr selbst. Dadurch eliminieren Sie das Risiko von Mikroleckagen, wie sie oft bei Press- oder Stecksystemen nach Jahren auftreten können.

advList: Wartungsfrei: Die Mechanik ist auf jahrzehntelange reibungslose Funktion ausgelegt.
Voller Durchgang: Kugelhähne mit vollem Querschnitt minimieren Druckverluste.
Einfache Integration: Direkt in das PP-R System einschweißbar.
Hochwertige Materialien: Ventilsitze und Kugeln aus korrosionsfesten Legierungen.
Sichere Absperrung: 100% dicht selbst unter extremen Druck- und Temperaturwechseln.
valves.seoText: Absperrarmaturen und Ventile von K-Aqua kombinieren die bewährte PP-R Schweißtechnik mit hochwertigen mechanischen Komponenten. Sie ermöglichen eine präzise Steuerung von Fluiden und eine sichere Isolation von Netzabschnitten für Wartungsarbeiten. Jede Armatur wird vor der Auslieferung strengen Druckprüfungen unterzogen, um höchste Betriebssicherheit in kritischen Anwendungen zu gewährleisten.

advList: Zertifizierte Qualität: Entspricht dem ISO 9001 Managementsystem.
Systemkompatibilität: Perfekt auf das K-Aqua Rohrsystem abgestimmt.
Langlebigkeit: Robuste Materialien für den rauen Baustellenalltag.
Sichere Anwendung: Garantierte Funktion bei fachgerechter Anwendung.
Wirtschaftlichkeit: Hervorragendes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis.
fallback.seoText: Als Systemanbieter liefert K-Aqua nicht nur Rohre und Fittings, sondern auch das gesamte benötigte Werkzeug und Zubehör. Vom hochpräzisen Schweißgerät bis zum zuverlässigen Rohrabschneider – unsere Werkzeuge garantieren eine normgerechte Verarbeitung und maximale Installationssicherheit. Setzen Sie auf Originalzubehör, um die Gewährleistung Ihres K-Aqua Gesamtsystems zu erhalten.

labels.faqFallbackA1: Das System bietet extreme Langlebigkeit, Korrosionsbeständigkeit und hervorragende hygienische Eigenschaften für Trinkwasser.
labels.faqFallbackA2: Ja, PP-RCT ist zu 100% recycelbar und hat einen sehr geringen CO2-Fußabdruck im Vergleich zu Metallrohren.
labels.faqFallbackA3: Die Installation erfolgt sicher und leckagefrei durch Polyfusion-Schweißen.

tools.metaDesc: K-Aqua 工具与配件 – 通过德国工程为全球大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。
tools.heroDesc: 该模块为全球要求最严苛的项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。按照最严格的行业标准制造，可使用几代人。在这里，材料失效绝不是一种选项。
tools.bentoLead: 当国际总承包商规划价值数十亿美元的项目时，他们不依赖承诺，而是依赖确凿的事实和高精度的设备。
tools.bento1Desc: 适用于尺寸从 20 毫米到 125 毫米。紧凑、坚固的设计，适用于恶劣的建筑工地环境。
tools.bento2Desc: 符合人体工程学的设计，可实现无疲劳的工作和完美的 90° 切割。
tools.bento3Desc: 适用于高达 250 毫米的公称直径。CNC 控制以实现绝对的重复性。
tools.bento4Desc: 钻头、维修鞍座和孔锯，用于后续分支。
tools.scrollLead: 探索使我们的工具成为认证安装人员首选的技术细节。
tools.scroll1Title: 完美的热力学。每次焊接都如此。
tools.scroll1Desc: 我们的加热元件承插焊接设备配备了高精度、涂有聚四氟乙烯的加热心轴和加热衬套。由微处理器控制的温度调节功能可保证 260°C 的恒定焊接温度——即使在全球建筑工地的极端室外温度下也是如此。这在分子层面上产生了一种不可分离的、均质的连接。
tools.scroll2Desc: 对于大公称直径（高达 250 毫米及以上），我们依靠 CNC 控制的对接焊机。自动压力和时间计算消除了人为错误。每个焊接循环都被数字化记录，以确保建筑验收的完全可追溯性。最高水平的德国工程。
tools.scroll3Title: 精密切管剥皮器。精确到毫米。
tools.scroll3Desc: 准备工作占焊接工作的 80%。我们的机械和电动切管剥皮器能以绝对均匀的切割深度去除 K-Aqua 管道上的氧化层。这可以防止微裂纹的产生，并创造出完美的融合面。一种经久耐用的工具。
tools.scroll4Title: 用于精确切割的冷圆锯。
tools.scroll4Desc: 管剪会使材料变形。我们的工业冷圆锯可保证完全呈直角、无毛刺的切割。结果：在焊接过程前，无应力诱发的裂纹、无压力损失、绝对的平面平行度。
tools.timelineDesc: 从切割到分子融合。这是一个标准化的过程，可带来 100% 防漏且免维护的管道系统。
tools.timeline1Text: 无毛刺的 90 度切口是任何永久性连接的基础。我们的精密裁切机和冷圆锯保证了绝对平坦的表面，而不会使聚丙烯发生微观结构变形。
tools.timeline2Text: 在焊接前，必须准确校准管道，并使用我们特殊的剥皮工具将外部氧化层去除至毫米级。这为融合过程提供了 100% 纯净的表面。
tools.timeline3Text: 管材和管件在涂有特氟龙的加热基质上同时加热至正好 260°C。K-Aqua 焊接设备的微处理器控制的恒温器可以保持温度恒定——无论刮风下雨。
tools.timeline4Text: 在规定的转换时间内，将加热后的部件连接在一起，不要扭曲。冷却阶段后，将生成一个全新的、完全均质的工件。50 多年免维护。
tools.specsTitle:
工业权威。
细致入微。
tools.specsP1: 几十年来，我们在位于德国中心的总厂将手工艺的自豪感与最先进的、高度自动化的制造技术结合起来。
tools.specsP2: 我们的材料在世界上最恶劣的沙漠和最极端的气候中使用，每天都在重新证明自己。我们设定了世界其他地方所遵循的标准。
tools.ctaTitle: 准备好享受毫不妥协的质量了吗？
tools.ctaDesc: 与我们的工程团队谈谈您的下一个大型项目，并索取我们的工具样品。

valves.metaTitle: 阀门与配件 | 德国工程 | K-Aqua
valves.metaDesc: K-Aqua 阀门与配件 – 通过德国工程为全球大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。探索技术上的完美。
valves.heroDesc: 欢迎来到流体技术的顶级联赛。K-Aqua 阀门和配件不仅仅是部件——它们是全球基础设施的坚不可摧的核心。为永恒而建。
valves.manifestoTitle:
当材料屈服时，系统就会崩溃。
我们绝不屈服。
valves.manifestoP1: 在工业流体工程中，阀门从来不仅仅是液体的开关。它是动能、极端压力、热膨胀和化学侵蚀性碰撞的关键交汇点。
valves.manifestoP2: 这就是平庸的量产产品与真正的工程艺术分道扬镳的地方。我们的阀门具有巨大的过度设计，以近乎偏执的精度制造，专为其他制造商声称“不可能”的场景而建造。这就是我们对 德国工程 的理解。
valves.scrollTitle: 从原材料到坚不可摧的阀门。
valves.scrollLead: 伴随 K-Aqua 阀门的创建过程。一条历经高温、高压和微观精度的毫不妥协的道路。
valves.scroll1Desc: 我们的阀门和配件开始于纯净的、经过工业认证的高性能材料。通过严格的光谱分析研究，我们在使用第一个铣头之前就保证绝对没有微观结构的薄弱点。这是在多年连续使用中获得绝对的耐腐蚀性和机械完整性不可妥协的基础。
valves.scroll2Desc: 每个组件都是在我们工厂采用最先进的 5 轴 CNC 加工中心由实心材料加工而成，公差小到不可思议的千分之一毫米以下。这种毫不妥协的精度确保了密封面的完美贴合。它彻底消除了泄漏风险，并保证了在数十年后依然绝对顺畅、如丝般柔滑且无磨损的运行。
valves.scroll3Desc: 阀门的好坏取决于其内部的流量分布。使用先进的计算流体动力学 (CFD)，我们设计了内部轮廓，从而几乎消除了湍流和气蚀。这意味着整个系统的压力损失更小，并且即使在最高流速下也能将噪音降至最低。
valves.scroll4Desc: 当涉及数十亿美元的基础设施时，随机抽样是不够的。在阀门离开 K-Aqua 工厂之前，它将接受完全自动化的机器人测试循环，该循环的负载远远超过实际负载。高压液压测试、氦真空泄漏测试和热冲击测试保证了我们传奇般的零缺陷率。
valves.showcaseP1: 我们阀门的内部架构始终旨在 零死区。细菌（如军团菌）可能繁殖的停滞区在几何上被消除了。
valves.showcaseP2: 水流在完全被引导的层流中射过阀体。坚固的密封座具有自清洁功能，即使在第一百万次循环后也能气密关闭。
valves.showcaseList1: 根据最高标准认证的饮用水卫生
valves.showcaseList2: 在最大工作压力下的气密密封
valves.showcaseList3: 带双 O 型圈的免维护主轴密封件
valves.bentoLead: 当营销词汇结束时，数据开始说话。了解使我们的阀门成为大型项目最终选择的技术参数。
valves.bento1Desc: 专为超出常规的连续高压应用而开发。壁厚和螺纹设计如此庞大，即使在极端压力峰值和水锤下也不会有丝毫让步。一块坚如磐石的安全基石。
valves.bento2Desc: 从冰冷刺骨到沸腾的流动温度。高端材料保持其充分的弹性，不会变脆，并能极其有效地抵抗热膨胀。
valves.bento3Desc: 腐蚀是过去的概念。我们的阀门对侵蚀性土壤条件、硬水和含氯消毒措施免疫。不生锈，无点蚀。
valves.bento4Title: 工业人体工程学和触觉
valves.bento4Desc: 设计满足最原始的功能。即使戴着厚重的防护手套，坚固的手轮、巨大的杠杆和精密制作的主轴也能在关闭和打开时提供即时、触觉和绝对精确的反馈。
valves.timelineLead: 一条毫不妥协的质量保证时间表。一个想法如何成为工业传奇。
valves.timeline1Text: 选择专为 K-Aqua 配制的金属合金和高性能聚合物。我们依靠绝对的抗蠕变性和最大的分子稳定性。
valves.timeline2Text: 使用超级计算机，在数千次迭代中计算内部流动通道，以将流动阻力最小化为零。
valves.timeline3Text: 原型在高达 120°C、25 巴压力和极端化学溶液的气候室中进行数月的耐久性测试。
valves.timeline4Text: 转移到我们高度自动化的工业 4.0 生产线。我们在没有人类误差来源的情况下，以最小的公差实现最大的可重复性。
valves.timeline5Text: 在世界上最关键的建筑工地上部署——从沙漠大型项目到海上设施。由我们的现场工程团队陪同。
valves.finalTitle:
为子孙后代而建。
而不是为了下一个维护间隔。
valves.finalDesc: 在一个越来越依赖快速报废和廉价替代产品的世界里，我们就像一个钢铁般的对立极。一个 K-Aqua 阀门被安装——然后被遗忘。因为它就是能工作。十年又十年。相信真正的工业权威。
valves.ctaTitle: 准备好进行绝对控制了吗？
valves.ctaDesc: 与我们的首席工程师讨论您下一个大型项目的规格。我们提供的解决方案能解决别人甚至还没有理解的问题。

meta.title: 配件和成型件 | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua 配件 – 通过德国工程技术为全球大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。

hero.desc: 该模块为全球最苛刻的项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。按照最严格的工业标准制造，经久耐用。在绝不允许材料失效的地方，K-Aqua 是您的起点。

intro.title: 安全并非巧合，而是可以计算的。
intro.lead: 当国际总承包商计划价值数十亿美元的项目时，他们不相信承诺，而是相信确凿的事实。我们制定了世界其他地区遵循的标准。
intro.text1: 几十年来，我们在德国中心的总厂一直将对工艺的自豪感与最先进的、高度自动化的制造技术相结合。每一个弯头、每一个套筒、每一个三通都带有德国工程技术无误的 DNA。我们的材料部署在世界上最严酷的沙漠、最极端的气候区和要求最苛刻的工业设施中，每天都在重新证明自己。
intro.text2: 我们 PP-R 系统中大分子的融合创建了一个没有弱点的管道网络。没有会腐蚀的密封圈，没有会受到化学物质侵蚀的胶接接头。管道和配件被热熔成一个不可分割的单一工件。这就是安全的绝对定义。

sticky.title: 可靠性的剖析。
sticky.lead: 深入了解使我们的配件成为全球基准的物理和化学特性。

0.title: 分子结构
0.desc: 我们的配件基于高度交联的 PP-R 聚丙烯无规共聚物。通过在挤出过程中控制温度和压力曲线，我们获得了各向同性的晶体结构。结果：对环境应力开裂和极端温度波动的抵抗力前所未有。

1.title: 热塑精度
1.desc: 每个模制零件都经过热塑注塑成型过程，型腔公差在微米范围内。这确保了在与我们的管道焊接时，熔融指数绝对相同——从而实现均匀、不可分离且 100% 无泄漏的材料连接。

2.title: 零缺陷容忍
2.desc: 我们绝不听天由命。使用超声波壁厚测量、静液压内压蠕变测试和 DSC（差示扫描量热法），分析每一批次。只有超过我们内部标准（远高于 DIN EN ISO 15874）的材料才会被放行。

3.title: 抗气蚀性

solutions.lead: Why polypropylene is the right material for tomorrow’s water supply — ecologically, technically and economically.

benefits.d: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be burned off uselessly — drastically reducing air pollution. Production uses water in a closed cooling loop, protecting rivers, streams and lakes.
PP carries recycling code "5" and can be separated by type. We recycle all production waste and offcuts — amid high demand for PP recyclate.
As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids — and injection-moulds complex geometries at low cost and high volume.
PP products last significantly longer than comparable materials: low-maintenance, wear-resistant and stable against ageing and temperature extremes.

textSection.title: 沉默背后的工程
textSection.p1: 摩天大楼和大型度假村综合体普遍存在极端的物理条件。水压被泵送到数百米高的空气中。温差将传统材料推向极限。
textSection.p2: 传统的铜系统在高流速下表现出明显的侵蚀迹象。高层酒店立管压力波动引起的气蚀不可避免地会导致微裂纹、点蚀，并最终导致灾难性的水损害，从而导致整个楼层瘫痪。对于酒店经营者来说，这不仅意味着巨额的装修费用，而且还意味着无法挽回的声誉损失。
textSection.p3: K-Aqua 采用了完全不同的方法。
textSection.p4: 我们的系统基于最新一代聚丙烯无规共聚物 (PP-R)。通过德国总部高度复杂的挤出工艺，我们调整聚合物链，使其具有前所未有的灵活性和耐极压性。如果系统中发生压力冲击（水锤），材料会弹性吸收该动能，而不是将其作为声冲击或机械裂纹传递到建筑结构。
textSection.h3: 同质焊接连接：泄漏的终结
textSection.p5: 任何管道系统中最薄弱的环节是连接。由于热循环，螺纹会腐蚀，密封圈会变得多孔，粘合连接会变得疲劳。
textSection.p6: 我们利用分子融合的原理。将管道和配件加热至 260°C，然后连接在一起。在几分之一秒之内，两种成分的聚合物链融合形成一个不可分离的整体单元。结果：不再有“联系”。管道和配件是一块连续的材料。无密封，无弱点，可靠性100%。

stickySection.title: 杰作的 DNA。
stickySection.lead: 我们如何通过彻底的工程解决现代酒店基础设施的最大挑战。

0.title: 1.分子水平的军团菌预防
0.p1: 在广泛的酒店网络中，暂时未使用的套房中的积水可能会成为致命的陷阱。军团菌在粗糙管壁上形成的生物膜中增殖。
0.p2: K-Aqua PP-R的微观表面粗糙度为0.007毫米。没有毛孔、没有壁龛、没有锚定点。结合热消毒，我们提供物理上最无菌的环境。

1.title: 2、绝对吸音
1.p1: 每个分贝都很重要。在豪华度假村中，邻近套房的厕所冲水或淋浴可能不会引人注意。
1.p2: 由于我们的复合材料（K-Aqua 纤维复合材料）的高密度和高内部阻尼系数，与金属系统相比，我们将结构噪声降低了 80%。您的客人不会听到这种差异。

2.title: 3. 摩天大楼的高压弹性
2.p1: 80、100或120层的酒店对立管提出了极高的要求。建筑物下部的静水压力非常大。
2.p2: K-Aqua 提供特殊的压力级别 (SDR 6 / PN 20) 与纤维增强材料的结合，即使在 70°C 的温度下，也能保证在连续负载下使用寿命超过 50 年。我们战胜了重力。

3.title: 4. 热管理和区域供冷
3.p1: 在迪拜或利雅得等沙漠地区，寒冷是最昂贵的商品。区域供冷系统将冷冻水长距离输送到度假村。
3.p2: PP-R 优异的隔热性能可防止形成冷凝，并极大地减少冷却损失。不再有生锈的冷水管，不再有滴水的天花板。纯粹、纯粹的效率。

faq.q: Which media is the system designed for?
faq.a: For drinking water — hot and cold — with high temperature and pressure resistance over decades. Thanks to PP’s resistance to solvents, alkalis and acids, industrial applications are possible too; we verify those with you project by project.

faq.q: What do the five SDR classes stand for?
faq.a: SDR is the ratio of outer diameter to wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure: SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6. You pick exactly the reserve each application needs — without over-dimensioning.

faq.q: When monolayer, when K-Fiber?
faq.a: Monolayer is the economical standard for most applications. The glass-fibre composite cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter, allows wider clamp spacing and stays dimensionally stable in large bores and hot water — the choice for risers, circulation and d ≥ 160.

faq.q: How are the pipes joined?
faq.a: By fusion welding — socket welding by hand (up to d63) or machine, electrofusion via heating-coil fittings, and butt fusion for large bores up to d630. Matching devices and tools are part of the programme; the Academy shows all four methods on video.

faq.q: Is the system compliant for drinking water?
faq.a: The system is engineered for drinking water; polypropylene is neutral in taste and odour. Conformity evidence for drinking-water contact (DVGW/KTW) is available in the Trust Center as part of the RFP document package.

faq.q: What service life underlies the design?
faq.a: The pressure classes are based on the long-term regression curves of DIN 8077/8078 with a design horizon of 50 years of operation — safety factor included. The two programme anchors: SDR 6 at 20 bar/20 °C and PP-RCT SDR 7.4 at 10 bar/70 °C.

faq.q: Where do I get binding article data?
faq.a: Filter every variant live in the Product Finder and export as CSV. Binding values come from the product catalogue (PDF); for project terms, the five-step project enquiry goes straight to sales — reply within one working day.

academyx.paramLead: Heating, changeover and cooling times for socket welding to DVS 2207-11 (heating element 250–270 °C) — the basis demonstrated in the videos.

academyx.stepLead: Each method has its dimension range — and five steps that decide the quality of the joint.

procs.t: Socket welding by hand — up to d63

steps.d: Cut the pipe square, deburr and chamfer cleanly — use the pipe cutters from the K-Aqua tool programme.
Mark the depth per table (e.g. 14 mm at d20) on the pipe — it defines the fusion zone.
Pipe into the heating socket, fitting onto the spigot — push on simultaneously and hold the heating time exactly.
Join axially within the changeover time. Never rotate: twisting destroys the plasticised structure.
Hold the joint for a few seconds, then respect the cooling time before applying any mechanical load.

procs.t: Socket welding by machine — medium dimensions

steps.d: Cutting, deburring, marking the depth — the ground rules stay identical.
The machine holds both parts coaxially — offset and tilt errors are mechanically excluded.
Heating socket and spigot per DVS reference values; the machine holds position and time reproducibly.
The feed joins axially and evenly — at d75 to d125 the key to consistent quality.
Unclamp and continue working only after the cooling time has elapsed.
Scrape and clean the pipe surface in the fusion zone — oxide skin and dirt prevent fusion.
Mark the depth on the pipe, push the pipe into the fitting up to the stop.
Use holding clamps — the fitting must not be under bending stress during welding.
The unit energises the heating coils embedded in the fitting — parameters come from the fitting, not from gut feeling.
Move or load only after the stated cooling time — check the indicators on the fitting.

procs.t: Butt fusion — large bores up to d630

steps.d: Plane both pipe ends in the machine until continuous shavings appear — plane-parallel faces are mandatory.
Offset no more than 10 % of the wall thickness — at d630 every millimetre counts.
Equalise under pressure until the bead forms, then heat-soak without pressure — times per DVS 2207-11.
Remove the element swiftly and bring the ends together under the defined joining pressure.
Joining pressure stays on until the cooling time ends — producing the homogeneous, permanently tight run.

academyx.errTitle: The six costliest mistakes — and their prevention.
errRows: The bead grows inwards and narrows the cross-section
Stop the heating time by the table — not by feel
The plasticised structure is destroyed, the joint leaks
Join axially only, use the depth mark as a control
Material piles up, the fusion zone becomes uneven
Deburr every cut — the tool is part of the system
Residues burn and embed themselves in the seam
Wipe the heating surfaces with a lint-free cloth before every weld
The seam deforms before it solidifies
Respect cooling times — 8 minutes at d110
Too short: small fusion area · too deep: narrowed bore
Always mark the depth, never estimate
gloss: SDR
Standard Dimension Ratio = outer diameter divided by wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure.
PN
Nominal pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6.
d / di / s
Outer diameter / inner diameter / wall thickness in millimetres — di = d − 2s.
PP-R
Polypropylene random copolymer — the proven standard material for drinking-water installations.
PP-RCT
PP-R with modified crystalline structure ("crystallinity temperature") — more temperature and pressure reserve at the same wall.
K-Fiber / GF
Glass-fibre reinforced multilayer construction — cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter.
Socket welding
Pipe and fitting are plasticised over a heating socket and spigot and pushed together.
Electrofusion
Heating coils embedded in the fitting generate the fusion heat — parameter-controlled.
Butt fusion
Plane-parallel pipe ends are heated at an element and joined under pressure — standard up to d630.
The rulebook for welding polypropylene — source of the reference values on this page.

posts.teaser: KWT GmbH’s ISO management system now covers quality, environment and energy — DAkkS-accredited.
body: Since October 2025, KWT GmbH’s management system is triple certified: ISO 9001:2015 for quality, ISO 14001:2015 for environment and ISO 50001:2018 for energy. The certificates are issued by a DAkkS-accredited certification body and are valid until October 2028.

For procurement and compliance this means documented, auditable processes from extruder to dispatch. The lived GENAU management system already met the requirements of DIN EN ISO 14001 and 50001 — certification makes it externally robust.
Both certificate versions (DE/EN) are available for download; bundle the full audit package in the Trust Center.

posts.t: Continuously marked: traceability from the extruder
posts.teaser: Every K-Aqua pipe carries continuous marking applied directly in the extrusion process.
body: At up to 14,000 metres of pipe per day and line, traceability is not optional: every pipe is continuously marked during extrusion — with the information specifiers and inspectors need on site.

The marking links the physical product to its batch and the QA test records. What is printed on the pipe can be traced back to the test lab — one building block of the QA manual that auditors can request in the Trust Center.

posts.teaser: From flare gas to drinking-water pipe: the short material history of polypropylene.
body: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be flared off uselessly — using them as a material cuts air pollution at the source. As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids and forms complex geometries in injection moulding.

Inside the pipe, the bore is what counts: at 0.007 mm roughness, pressure loss stays minimal and biofilm and incrustation find little hold. Add thermal conductivity of 0.24 W/(m·K) — hot water stays hot without the line working against itself.
PP-RCT pushes the limits further: the modified crystalline structure brings more temperature and pressure reserve — SDR 7.4 sustains 70 °C at 10 bar continuously.

posts.t: Brass meets polypropylene: transitions into existing stock
posts.teaser: Renovation almost always means a system change — transition pieces with brass threads make it clean.
body: Hardly any project starts on a greenfield: existing copper or galvanised-steel lines must be connected. Transition pieces with embedded brass female or male threads do the job — the thread side connects the metal stock, the PP side is fusion-welded.

This enables section-by-section renovation: corroded runs are replaced, working ones remain — and the corrosion problem does not migrate into the new system. Unions keep the connection detachable where needed, e.g. at valves and water meters.

From the detail panel straight into the project enquiry — we finalise dimensions and quantities together.

co2x.methLead: Transparency instead of a black box — four building blocks behind every result.

meth.d: Pipe mass follows from ring cross-section × length × density (0.905 g/cm³) — the same geometry as in the dimension tables.
The emission factors per material are demonstration values for the system comparison. Binding factors come from ecoinvent or product-specific Type III EPDs to EN 15804.
Converted at roughly 25 kg of CO₂ bound per tree per year and 0.15 kg CO₂e per car kilometre — orders of magnitude everyone in the project meeting understands.
For audits and certification, the document counts: EPD data sheets and scope-3 data are available in the Trust Center or on request.

co2x.certLead: CO₂ evidence is not an end in itself — it pays directly into building certifications.

certs.d: EPDs to EN 15804 pay into the material credits — the calculator delivers the early argument, the EPD the proof.
Life-cycle data of materials flows into the assessment — robust through Type III declarations.
The building’s life-cycle assessment decides entire criteria groups — low-GWP material choice acts directly.

co2x.scopeText: Scope 1 covers the plant’s direct emissions, scope 2 the purchased electricity, scope 3 the supply chain — including the pipes you buy. That is why K-Aqua provides scope-3 data and raw EPD data on request: proactive transparency for your own climate accounting.
co2x.statNote: From industry studies: about half of B2B customers prefer to buy from demonstrably sustainable suppliers — the evidence becomes a procurement criterion.

plant.l: pipe production per extrusion line — capacity for large projects
inner surface roughness — minimal pressure loss, hardly any biofilm
design horizon per the long-term curves of DIN 8077/8078

homedeep.badgeNote: Certificates and audit documents as self-service in the Trust Center.

sections.title: 1. An overview of data protection
sections.content:
General
The following gives a simple overview of what happens to your personal information when you visit our website. Personal information is any data with which you could be personally identified. Detailed information on the subject of data protection can be found in our privacy policy found below.

Data collection on our website
Who is responsible for the data collection on this website?
The data collected on this website are processed by the website operator. The operator's contact details can be found in the website's required legal notice.

How do we collect your data?
Some data are collected when you provide it to us. This could, for example, be data you enter on a contact form.
Other data are collected automatically by our IT systems when you visit the website. These data are primarily technical data such as the browser and operating system you are using or when you accessed the page. These data are collected automatically as soon as you enter our website.

What do we use your data for?
Part of the data is collected to ensure the proper functioning of the website. Other data can be used to analyze how visitors use the site.

What rights do you have regarding your data?
You always have the right to request information about your stored data, its origin, its recipients, and the purpose of its collection at no charge. You also have the right to request that it be corrected, blocked, or deleted. You can contact us at any time using the address given in the legal notice if you have further questions about the issue of privacy and data protection. You may also, of course, file a complaint with the competent regulatory authorities.

sections.title: 2. General information and mandatory information
sections.content:
The operators of this website take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data as confidential and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.

If you use this website, various pieces of personal data will be collected. Personal information is any data with which you could be personally identified. This privacy policy explains what information we collect and what we use it for. It also explains how and for what purpose this happens.

Please note that data transmitted via the internet (e.g. via email communication) may be subject to security breaches. Complete protection of your data from third-party access is not possible.

Notice concerning the party responsible for this website
The party responsible for processing data on this website is:

KWT GmbH
Auweg 3
35647, Waldsolms-Brandoberndorf
(0)60 85 / 9868-410
info@k-aqua.de

The responsible party is the natural or legal person who alone or jointly with others decides on the purposes and means of processing personal data (names, email addresses, etc.).

Revocation of your consent to the processing of your data
Many data processing operations are only possible with your express consent. You may revoke your consent at any time with future effect. An informal email making this request is sufficient. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed

Right to file complaints with regulatory authorities
If there has been a breach of data protection legislation, the person affected may file a complaint with the competent regulatory authorities. The competent regulatory authority for matters related to data protection legislation is the data protection officer of the German state in which our company is headquartered. A list of data protection officers and their contact details can be found at the following link: https://www.bfdi.bund.de/DE/Infothek/Anschriften_Links/anschriften_links-node.html.

Right to data portability
You have the right to have data which we process based on your consent or in fulfillment of a contract automatically delivered to yourself or to a third party in a standard, machine-readable format. If you require the direct transfer of data to another responsible party, this will only be done to the extent technically feasible.

SSL or TLS encryption
This site uses SSL or TLS encryption for security reasons and for the protection of the transmission of confidential content, such as the inquiries you send to us as the site operator. You can recognize an encrypted connection in your browser's address line when it changes from "http://" to "https://" and the lock icon is displayed in your browser's address bar.

If SSL or TLS encryption is activated, the data you transfer to us cannot be read by third parties.

Information, blocking, deletion
As permitted by law, you have the right to be provided at any time with information free of charge about any of your personal data that is stored as well as its origin, the recipient and the purpose for which it has been processed. You also have the right to have this data corrected, blocked or deleted. You can contact us at any time using the address given in our legal notice if you have further questions on the topic of personal data.

Opposition to promotional emails
We hereby expressly prohibit the use of contact data published in the context of website legal notice requirements with regard to sending promotional and informational materials not expressly requested. The website operator reserves the right to take specific legal action if unsolicited advertising material, such as email spam, is received.

sections.title: 4. Data collection on our website
sections.content:
Cookies
Some of our web pages use cookies. Cookies do not harm your computer and do not contain any viruses. Cookies help make our website more user-friendly, efficient, and secure. Cookies are small text files that are stored on your computer and saved by your browser.

Most of the cookies we use are so-called "session cookies." They are automatically deleted after your visit. Other cookies remain in your device's memory until you delete them. These cookies make it possible to recognize your browser when you next visit the site.

You can configure your browser to inform you about the use of cookies so that you can decide on a case-by-case basis whether to accept or reject a cookie. Alternatively, your browser can be configured to automatically accept cookies under certain conditions or to always reject them, or to automatically delete cookies when closing your browser. Disabling cookies may limit the functionality of this website.

Cookies which are necessary to allow electronic communications or to provide certain functions you wish to use (such as the shopping cart) are stored pursuant to Art. 6 paragraph 1, letter f of DSGVO. The website operator has a legitimate interest in the storage of cookies to ensure an optimized service provided free of technical errors. If other cookies (such as those used to analyze your surfing behavior) are also stored, they will be treated separately in this privacy policy.

Server log files
The website provider automatically collects and stores information that your browser automatically transmits to us in "server log files". These are:

Browser type and browser version
Operating system used
Referrer URL
Host name of the accessing computer
Time of the server request
IP address
These data will not be combined with data from other sources.

The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (f) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract.

Contact form
Should you send us questions via the contact form, we will collect the data entered on the form, including the contact details you provide, to answer your question and any follow-up questions. We do not share this information without your permission.

We will, therefore, process any data you enter onto the contact form only with your consent per Art. 6 (1)(a) DSGVO. You may revoke your consent at any time. An informal email making this request is sufficient. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed.

We will retain the data you provide on the contact form until you request its deletion, revoke your consent for its storage, or the purpose for its storage no longer pertains (e.g. after fulfilling your request). Any mandatory statutory provisions, especially those regarding mandatory data retention periods, remain unaffected by this provision.

Registration on this website
You can register on our website in order to access additional functions offered here. The input data will only be used for the purpose of using the respective site or service for which you have registered. The mandatory information requested during registration must be provided in full. Otherwise, we will reject your registration.

To inform you about important changes such as those within the scope of our site or technical changes, we will use the email address specified during registration.

We will process the data provided during registration only based on your consent per Art. 6 (1)(a) DSGVO. You may revoke your consent at any time with future effect. An informal email making this request is sufficient. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed.

We will continue to store the data collected during registration for as long as you remain registered on our website. Statutory retention periods remain unaffected.

Processing of data (customer and contract data)
We collect, process, and use personal data only insofar as it is necessary to establish, or modify legal relationships with us (master data). This is done based on Art. 6 (1) (b) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract. We collect, process and use your personal data when accessing our website (usage data) only to the extent required to enable you to access our service or to bill you for the same.

Collected customer data shall be deleted after completion of the order or termination of the business relationship. Legal retention periods remain unaffected.

Data transmitted when entering into a contract
We transmit personally identifiable data to third parties only to the extent required to fulfill the terms of your contract, for example, to companies entrusted to deliver goods to your location or banks entrusted to process your payments. Your data will not be transmitted for any other purpose unless you have given your express permission to do so. Your data will not be disclosed to third parties for advertising purposes without your express consent.

The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (b) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract.

Data transferred when signing up for services and digital content
We transmit personally identifiable data to third parties only to the extent required to fulfill the terms of your contract with us, for example, to banks entrusted to process your payments.

Your data will not be transmitted for any other purpose unless you have given your express permission to do so. Your data will not be disclosed to third parties for advertising purposes without your express consent.

The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (b) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract.

sections.title: 5. Social media
sections.content:
Share content via plugins (Facebook, Google+1, Twitter, etc.)
The content on our pages can be shared on other social networks like Facebook, Twitter, or Google+. This page uses the eRecht24 Safe Sharing Tool. This tool establishes direct contact between the networks and users only after users click on one of these buttons.

This tool does not automatically transfer user data to the operators of these platforms. If users are logged into one or more of the social networks, the Like, +1, and Share buttons for Facebook, Google+1, Twitter, etc. will display an information window in which the user can edit the text before it is sent.

Our users can share the content of this page on social networks without their providers creating profiles of users' surfing behavior.

Facebook plugins (Like & Share buttons)
Our website includes plugins for the social network Facebook, Facebook Inc., 1 Hacker Way, Menlo Park, California 94025, USA. The Facebook plugins can be recognized by the Facebook logo or the Like button on our site. For an overview of Facebook plugins, see https://developers.facebook.com/docs/plugins/.

When you visit our site, a direct connection between your browser and the Facebook server is established via the plugin. This enables Facebook to receive information that you have visited our site from your IP address. If you click on the Facebook "Like button" while you are logged into your Facebook account, you can link the content of our site to your Facebook profile. This allows Facebook to associate visits to our site with your user account. Please note that, as the operator of this site, we have no knowledge of the content of the data transmitted to Facebook or of how Facebook uses these data. For more information, please see Facebook's privacy policy at https://de-de.facebook.com/policy.php.

If you do not want Facebook to associate your visit to our site with your Facebook account, please log out of your Facebook account.

sections.title: 6. Analytics and advertising
sections.content:
Google Analytics
This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service. It is operated by Google Inc., 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA.

Google Analytics uses so-called "cookies". These are text files that are stored on your computer and that allow an analysis of the use of the website by you. The information generated by the cookie about your use of this website is usually transmitted to a Google server in the USA and stored there.

Google Analytics cookies are stored based on Art. 6 (1) (f) DSGVO. The website operator has a legitimate interest in analyzing user behavior to optimize both its website and its advertising.

IP anonymization
We have activated the IP anonymization feature on this website. Your IP address will be shortened by Google within the European Union or other parties to the Agreement on the European Economic Area prior to transmission to the United States. Only in exceptional cases is the full IP address sent to a Google server in the US and shortened there. Google will use this information on behalf of the operator of this website to evaluate your use of the website, to compile reports on website activity, and to provide other services regarding website activity and Internet usage for the website operator. The IP address transmitted by your browser as part of Google Analytics will not be merged with any other data held by Google.

Browser plugin
You can prevent these cookies being stored by selecting the appropriate settings in your browser. However, we wish to point out that doing so may mean you will not be able to enjoy the full functionality of this website. You can also prevent the data generated by cookies about your use of the website (incl. your IP address) from being passed to Google, and the processing of these data by Google, by downloading and installing the browser plugin available at the following link: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout?hl=en.

Objecting to the collection of data
You can prevent the collection of your data by Google Analytics by clicking on the following link. An opt-out cookie will be set to prevent your data from being collected on future visits to this site: Disable Google Analytics.
For more information about how Google Analytics handles user data, see Google's privacy policy: https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/6004245?hl=en.

Outsourced data processing
We have entered into an agreement with Google for the outsourcing of our data processing and fully implement the strict requirements of the German data protection authorities when using Google Analytics.

Demographic data collection by Google Analytics
This website uses Google Analytics' demographic features. This allows reports to be generated containing statements about the age, gender, and interests of site visitors. This data comes from interest-based advertising from Google and third-party visitor data. This collected data cannot be attributed to any specific individual person. You can disable this feature at any time by adjusting the ads settings in your Google account or you can forbid the collection of your data by Google Analytics as described in the section "Refusal of data collection".

sections.title: 7. Newsletter
sections.content:
Newsletter data
If you would like to receive our newsletter, we require a valid email address as well as information that allows us to verify that you are the owner of the specified email address and that you agree to receive this newsletter. No additional data is collected or is only collected on a voluntary basis. We only use this data to send the requested information and do not pass it on to third parties.

We will, therefore, process any data you enter onto the contact form only with your consent per Art. 6 (1) (a) DSGVO. You can revoke consent to the storage of your data and email address as well as their use for sending the newsletter at any time, e.g. through the "unsubscribe" link in the newsletter. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed.

The data provided when registering for the newsletter will be used to distribute the newsletter until you cancel your subscription when said data will be deleted. Data we have stored for other purposes (e.g. email addresses for the members area) remain unaffected.

sections.title: 8. Plugins and tools
sections.content:
YouTube
Our website uses plugins from YouTube, which is operated by Google. The operator of the pages is YouTube LLC, 901 Cherry Ave., San Bruno, CA 94066, USA.

If you visit one of our pages featuring a YouTube plugin, a connection to the YouTube servers is established. Here the YouTube server is informed about which of our pages you have visited.

navigation.cookieDesc: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

pipes.title: Superior Durability & Hygiene
pipes.desc: Our high-performance pipe systems made of PP-R and PP-RCT offer over 50 years of maintenance-free lifespan. The extremely smooth inner surface prevents incrustation, corrosion, and biofilm formation – for maximum drinking water hygiene according to the highest global standards.

pipes.title: Thermal Efficiency & Insulation
pipes.desc: Due to the naturally low thermal conductivity of the material, our pipes drastically minimize heat loss. Compared to metallic pipes, you save significant energy costs and reduce your project's CO2 footprint.

pipes.title: Maximum Resilience
pipes.desc: Developed for extreme conditions: Whether high system pressures or critical temperatures in HVAC systems – the multi-layer fiber composite technology guarantees minimal linear expansion and absolute dimensional stability.

fittings.title: Homogeneous Welded Joint
fittings.desc: K-Aqua fittings fuse into an inseparable, 100% leak-free unit with the pipe through socket fusion welding. No O-rings, no mechanical weak points.

fittings.title: High-Quality Transitions
fittings.desc: Our transition fittings use deeply embedded, dezincification-resistant brass threaded inserts (CW617N). This guarantees maximum torsional strength and secure connections to metallic components.

fittings.title: Full Flow
fittings.desc: The flow-optimized design of our fittings minimizes pressure losses in the pipeline network and ensures highest efficiency in water distribution.

valves.title: Precise Control
valves.desc: K-Aqua valves offer excellent flow control and complete shut-off without pressure loss. Maintenance-free, smooth operation, and corrosion-resistant.

valves.title: Full Bore & Efficiency
valves.desc: The full-bore design ensures no flow resistance when the valve is fully open – ideal for pumping systems and risers.

fallback.title: System Compatibility
fallback.desc: Perfectly matched to the entire K-Aqua product range. Guarantees smooth installation and maximum system security.

fallback.title: Certified Quality
fallback.desc: Manufactured under strictest quality controls (ISO 9001/14001). Tested worldwide and approved for demanding projects.

cookieConsent.title: Privacy Preferences & Cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies and similar technologies (like pixels and local storage) to provide you with the best possible experience on our platform. Some are essential, while others help us improve this website. You always have full control.
cookieConsent.essentialDesc: These cookies are strictly necessary for the proper functioning of the website (e.g., navigation, security, saving your privacy preferences). Without these technologies, K-Aqua cannot operate correctly. They do not store any personally identifiable information.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand the behavior of our visitors. We collect pseudonymized data on how users interact with K-Aqua (e.g., most visited pages, time on site, error messages). This allows us to fix errors and continuously improve the platform.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: We use these technologies to show you more relevant content and advertisements – even on external platforms. If you disable this, you will still see ads, but they will be less tailored to your interests.

landwirtschaft.metaDesc: K-Aqua 农业 – 全球农业项目的高性能基础设施。通过德国工程实现毫不妥协的安全性。
landwirtschaft.heroDesc: 全球粮食安全在灌溉方面容不得半点妥协。K-Aqua 为世界上最大的农业项目提供高性能系统。按照最严格的行业标准制造。在管道破裂需要付出数百万代价的地方，K-Aqua 是唯一合乎逻辑的选择。
landwirtschaft.section1Lead: 当在撒哈拉沙漠中部或澳大利亚大草原上建造巨大的灌溉系统时，良莠立见。传统系统在紫外线负荷、持续的压力变化和侵蚀性的土壤化学环境下会发生故障。K-Aqua 正是为这些极端情况而开发的。
landwirtschaft.section2Lead: 我们管道系统的每一毫米都是德国在聚合物技术方面数十年研发的成果。
landwirtschaft.scroll1Title: 绝对的抗紫外线和耐候性
landwirtschaft.scroll1Desc: 在现代农业中，管道系统通常多年暴露在阳光直射和极端温度波动的环境中。我们专有的聚合物矩阵可吸收紫外线辐射而不会发生分子降解。结果：没有脆化，没有微裂纹，即使在沙漠中使用数十年也能保持 100% 的结构完整性。
landwirtschaft.scroll2Title: 复杂灌溉的压力稳定性
landwirtschaft.scroll2Desc: 大型中心枢轴灌溉系统和滴灌软管需要长距离提供持续、巨大的水压。K-Aqua 系统旨在通过动力学方式吸收压力峰值和水锤。无缝焊接技术保证了每个接头的绝对密封性——零泄漏容限，实现资源利用效率最大化。
landwirtschaft.scroll3Desc: 现代灌溉施肥（通过灌溉系统施用液体肥料和农药）需要管道高度耐受侵蚀性化学物质、酸和碱。我们的 K-Aqua PPR 系统不会与农用化学品发生反应，由于其光滑如镜的内壁可防止沉积物，从而保护土壤健康。
landwirtschaft.scroll4Title: 通过生物安全保障产量
landwirtschaft.scroll4Desc: 管道内的微生物生长可能会破坏整个收成。K-Aqua 依靠防粘内表面，使生物膜的形成和藻类生长几乎不可能。源头的清洁水到达植物时仍然是清洁水。德国工程保障全球粮食安全。
landwirtschaft.section3Lead: 选择 K-Aqua 是一种数学上的确定性。更低的总拥有成本 (TCO) 加上绝对的操作安全性。
landwirtschaft.bento1Desc: 忘记 O 形圈、胶水或机械接头吧。K-Aqua 管道和接头在分子水平上融合成一个单一的、不可分割的整体。泄漏的风险降至数学上精确的 0%。
landwirtschaft.bento2Desc: 与金属系统相比，K-Aqua 管道的重量只是其一小部分。这彻底改变了施工现场的物流，显著降低了运输成本，即使在难以到达的地形中也能快速安装。
landwirtschaft.bento3Desc: 该材料具有内在的灵活性。在土壤运动、沉降或极端温度波动的情况下，管道系统可以适应而不会破裂。钢会撕裂，而 K-Aqua 会弯曲。
landwirtschaft.bento4Desc: 摩擦系数接近零。这意味着长距离上的压力损失更小，这意味着泵系统的尺寸可以显著减小。这不仅节省了初始资金，而且还大幅降低了未来数十年的能源成本。
landwirtschaft.section4P1: 当灌溉系统出现故障意味着成千上万公顷的农作物全部绝收时，传统的衡量标准已经不够了。我们用代代相传的时间来衡量可靠性。
landwirtschaft.section4P2: K-Aqua 对其工业农业管道进行了远超现实的操作场景认证。在任何一根管道离开我们德国工厂之前，我们都会模拟极端的水锤、腐蚀性化学混合物和持续的地震微振动。
landwirtschaft.timelineDesc: 从最初的流体动力学分析到现场的最终融合。一个完全协调的过程，实现最大可扩展性。
landwirtschaft.timeline1Text: 我们的工程师使用卫星数据库分析农业项目的拓扑和气候条件，并创建流体动力学配置文件。
landwirtschaft.timeline2Text: 在我们德国总部单独挤出 K-Aqua 管道系统。每批产品都经过高分辨率超声波测试。
landwirtschaft.timeline3Text: 完整的集装箱化和全球运输。我们的系统重量轻，并且针对运输到地球上最偏远的种植区进行了优化。
landwirtschaft.timeline4Text: 直接在现场进行均质焊接连接。我们的热塑性融合技术创建了一个没有薄弱点或密封件的整体式管道系统。
landwirtschaft.timeline5Text: 系统投入运行后，基础设施就从人们的意识中消失了。它就是管用。在接下来的 50 多年里。没有维护周期。
landwirtschaft.section5Desc: K-Aqua 农业系统已通过最知名的国际测试机构认证。我们不仅满足标准——我们经常重新定义它们。
landwirtschaft.section5List4: 高达 25 Bar 的高压认证
landwirtschaft.ctaTitle: 您的收成太珍贵了，不能妥协。
landwirtschaft.ctaDesc: 让我们讨论您下一个大型项目的液压基础设施。我们的工程师将根据您的具体要求进行详细的技术分析。

schiffbau.metaDesc: K-Aqua 造船 – 通过德国工程为全球大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全性。
schiffbau.heroDesc: 该模块为全球最苛刻的海洋大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全性。按照最严格的行业标准制造，以在最极端的条件下经受住考验。在材料失效绝对不可接受的地方，K-Aqua 是唯一的答案。
schiffbau.section1Title: 毫不妥协的安全。在广阔的海洋上，没有容错的空间。
schiffbau.section1Lead: 当造船厂、船东和国际总承包商规划数十亿美元的项目时，他们不依赖营销承诺，而是依赖确凿的物理事实。我们的系统是专门为无情的海洋现实而开发的。
schiffbau.section1P1: 海事行业正面临前所未有的挑战。船只越来越大，航线越来越极端，环境法规也越来越严格。在这种环境下，传统的金属管道系统已经过时。它们笨重、易腐蚀且安装复杂。K-Aqua 提供了范式的转变。
schiffbau.section1P2: 我们将材料科学推向极限，创造出一种不与自然力量对抗，而是驾驭它们的管道系统。这种系统不会给船只增加负担，反而会积极增加其寿命和效率。这是最纯粹的德国工程技术的结晶。
schiffbau.scroll1Title: 在海洋环境中绝对的耐腐蚀性
schiffbau.scroll1Desc: 盐水、极端湿度和持续的化学应力会在创纪录的时间内摧毁传统材料。我们专有的基于 PPR 的聚合物矩阵结构提供对海洋腐蚀的 100% 免疫力。无需牺牲阳极，无需昂贵的涂层，无需维护间隔。一旦安装，系统在几十年内对最具侵蚀性的介质保持惰性。
schiffbau.scroll2Title: 减轻重量以实现最高效率
schiffbau.scroll2Desc: 在现代航运中，每节省一公斤都意味着金钱，并能减少碳足迹。与金属管道相比，K-Aqua 造船系统可节省高达 70% 的重量。这不仅提高了船舶的燃油效率，而且极大地简化了在船体狭小空间内的搬运和安装。
schiffbau.scroll3Desc: 船舶发动机、轴系和持续的波浪作用会产生持续的振动，这不可避免地会导致刚性系统的材料疲劳和微裂纹。我们的 K-Aqua 系统的分子结构自然地阻尼这些频率。再加上极高的抗压强度，系统还能承受关键时刻不可预见的压力峰值。
schiffbau.scroll4Desc: 链条的强度取决于它最薄弱的环节。这就是为什么 K-Aqua 系统没有由密封件或螺纹引起的传统弱点。通过我们先进的共熔焊接技术，管道和管件在分子水平上融合成一个不可分割、完全同质的整体。一种永久紧密连接，即使是极端的拉力和剪切力也能承受。
schiffbau.section2Lead: 数字不会说谎。看一眼规格就能明白为什么 K-Aqua 是造船业的新标准。
schiffbau.bento1Desc: 传统系统往往在短短几年后就出现疲劳的初步迹象，而 K-Aqua 则专为船舶的整个生命周期而设计。没有任何如果、而且或但是。
schiffbau.bento2Desc: 所有系统均严格按照 DIN EN ISO 15874 制造，并获得必要的认证。
schiffbau.bento3Desc: 我们管道极度光滑的内表面有效地防止了结垢和生物污损。
schiffbau.bento4Desc: K-Aqua 具有出色的内在绝缘性能，可减少冷凝并节省隔热材料。
schiffbau.section3P1: 几十年来，我们在德国中心的超现代化总部，将毫不妥协的工艺与最先进的、全自动的制造技术相结合。每一台挤出机、每一台注塑机都经过校准，以提供微米级的完美。
schiffbau.section3P2: 部署在世界各大洋，从北极冰冷的水域到赤道的热带环境，我们的材料每天都在重新证明自己。我们不仅仅是制造管道。我们为远洋客轮、游轮和高度复杂的近海平台创造了关键的动脉。
schiffbau.section3P3: 在冷却系统故障可能带来灾难性后果的地方，在必须绝对保证数千名乘客的淡水供应的地方——这就是我们应用领域的起点。我们设定了世界其他地区遵循的标准。一个由绝对可靠性定义的标准。
schiffbau.section3List1: 整个使用寿命内 100% 免维护
schiffbau.section3List2: 借助预制和焊接技术，安装简便安全
schiffbau.section3List3: 对压载水、冷却介质和清洁剂具有高耐化学性
schiffbau.section4Lead: 我们的承诺并没有随着交付而结束。我们将自己视为整个造船价值链中不可或缺的合作伙伴。
schiffbau.timeline1Title: 阶段 1：材料研究与压力测试
schiffbau.timeline1Desc: 每个新的产品迭代都要在我们的德国实验室里进行数月的测试，测试在远远超出实际海洋条件的极端压力、温度和负载场景下进行。
schiffbau.timeline2Desc: 我们的系统由领先的海事认证机构（如 DNV、劳氏船级社、ABS）进行测试，并被批准在海上无妥协地使用。
schiffbau.timeline3Title: 阶段 3：精密制造与零缺陷容忍
schiffbau.timeline3Desc: 我们高度自动化的设施中的生产受到持续的 360 度质量控制。出厂的每一件产品都是德国工程的杰作。
schiffbau.timeline4Title: 阶段 4：全球物流与现场工程
schiffbau.timeline4Desc: 准时交货给全球任何一家造船厂。应要求，我们的工程团队将陪同安装过程，以确保最高效率和绝对的系统安全性。
schiffbau.section5Desc: 我们不相信捷径。我们相信物理压力测试、多重质量控制以及每天晚上都能安然入睡的工程师，因为他们知道自己设计的系统在任何可以想象的情况下都能经受住考验。K-Aqua 不仅仅是一个产品。它是海事行业信任的结晶。
schiffbau.ctaTitle: 为造船业的未来做好准备了吗？
schiffbau.ctaDesc: 让我们来谈谈您的下一个大型项目。我们敬业的海事工程团队已准备好规划、优化和实现您船只的关键基础设施。

klimaanlagen.metaTitle: 暖通空调及制冷基础设施 | K-Aqua
klimaanlagen.metaDesc: K-Aqua 暖通空调及制冷 – 通过德国工程实现毫不妥协的安全性。用于冷冻水、空调和工业制冷的聚丙烯管道系统。
klimaanlagen.heroEyebrow: 细分市场：暖通空调及制冷
klimaanlagen.heroDesc: 为冷水管网和暖通空调系统提供毫不妥协的安全保障。当全球性大型项目不容许任何停机时，K-Aqua 是唯一的选择。专为几代人设计。
klimaanlagen.section1Title: 现代暖通空调系统的致命弱点。
klimaanlagen.section1Lead: 使用钢制螺纹和铜制压接配件的传统冷却系统必然无法对抗热力学和化学定律。K-Aqua 提供了摆脱腐蚀和泄漏循环的出路。
klimaanlagen.section1P1: 在工业制冷和建筑暖通空调中，冷凝、永久的温度波动和腐蚀性的冷却介质对管道系统提出了极高的要求。金属管道的反应是冷凝水腐蚀、隔热层损坏和压力逐渐丧失。
klimaanlagen.section1P2: K-Aqua 聚丙烯系统（PP-R & PP-RCT） 打破了这种模式。我们的管网对腐蚀完全惰性，具有出色的流动特性且不会结垢，并且拥有内在的隔热功能，大大减少了对外部保温的需求。这不是一根管道，而是一份基础设施的保险单。
klimaanlagen.scroll1Desc: 我们的 PP-R 和 PP-RCT 系统天生具有极低的热导率。这在很大程度上消除了管道外部形成冷凝水的风险——这是现代空调技术中的一个关键因素。与金属系统不同，昂贵且耗时的二次隔热通常是不必要的。
klimaanlagen.scroll2Desc: 由钢制成的冷水系统不可避免地会受到腐蚀，导致点蚀、泄漏和系统的逐渐破坏。K-Aqua 系统 100% 耐腐蚀。在其 50 多年的整个生命周期内，不会结垢，不会生锈，管道横截面也不会变窄。
klimaanlagen.scroll3Desc: 我们安全技术的核心。通过共熔，管道和管件在分子水平上融合成一个不可分割、同质的整体。没有 O 形圈，没有会随着时间推移而疲劳的机械连接元件。结果是绝对的密封性，即使在最强的压力波动和机械应力下也是如此。
klimaanlagen.scroll4Desc: 现代暖通空调系统要求静音运行。与金属替代品相比，K-Aqua 塑料管道系统吸收水流噪音和泵振动的效果要好得多。这使其能够在对噪音敏感的区域（如手术室、豪华酒店和音乐厅）使用，而无需复杂的二次隔音设施。
klimaanlagen.section2Lead: 探索使 K-Aqua 成为国际机电工程 (MEP) 规划者和总承包商首选的设计原则。
klimaanlagen.bentoSubheader: 在工业制冷和空调技术的各个方面都具有可衡量的优势。
klimaanlagen.bento1Desc: 即使在使用适当传热介质（例如，乙二醇混合物）的极低流动温度下，也能安全运行。
klimaanlagen.bento2Desc: 适合任何规模的完整尺寸系列——从单间冷却到中央冷水机组。
klimaanlagen.bento3Desc: 与钢管相比。这使得能够进行快速的架空安装，减少了结构载荷，并显著降低了运输成本。
klimaanlagen.bento4Desc: 材料结合的焊接接头完全消除了传统法兰和螺纹连接的故障风险。
klimaanlagen.timelineLead: 从最初的热力计算到几十年免维护运行。K-Aqua 以毫不妥协的精度陪伴着过程的每一步。
klimaanlagen.timeline1Desc: 计算压力降、热线膨胀和水力平衡。我们的工程师提供高达 DN 400 的尺寸设计支持。
klimaanlagen.timeline2Desc: 在我们德国总部洁净室条件下进行挤出和注塑成型。对每批次进行无缝质量控制。
klimaanlagen.timeline3Desc: 及时交付至施工现场。PP-R 的轻量化（比钢轻约 75%）大大简化了运输和装卸物流。
klimaanlagen.timeline4Desc: 通过热熔承插焊接，安装速度可提高 50%。无明火，无飞溅火花，最大限度地提高职业安全性。
klimaanlagen.timeline5Desc: 成功的压力测试和系统移交。从这一刻起，K-Aqua 系统长达数十年、完全免维护的运行阶段开始了。
klimaanlagen.section3P1: K-Aqua 暖通空调系统根据最严格的国际标准进行测试和认证。PP-RCT 的材料特性允许在减小壁厚的情况下承受更高的压力载荷。
klimaanlagen.section3P2: 这意味着：在相同外径下具有更大的内径，从而最大限度地提高水力流量，并大幅降低冷却管网所需的泵送能量。
klimaanlagen.card1Desc: 符合 DIN EN ISO 15874 和 SKZ 指南。
klimaanlagen.card2Desc: 管网无需维护。100% 免维护。
klimaanlagen.card3Desc: 经过认证的 K-Aqua 安装人员的全球网络。
klimaanlagen.card4Desc: 认证项目的延长系统保修。
klimaanlagen.ctaTitle: 保护您的下一个大型项目。
klimaanlagen.ctaDesc: 我们的工程师已准备好为您的项目调整冷却基础设施的尺寸。受益于制定标准的德国工程。

industrie.metaDesc: K-Aqua 工业厂房 – 通过德国工程为全球大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。
industrie.heroDesc: 当公差以微米为单位进行测量，并且系统故障会造成数百万美元的损失时，全球技术领导者信任 K-Aqua。满足最苛刻工业要求的、毫不妥协的管道系统。
industrie.section1Lead: 在现代高性能工业中，没有材料疲劳的容身之地。我们的系统不仅是为今天的标准开发的——它们还定义了明天的规范。
industrie.bento1Desc: 我们的 PP-R 和 PP-RCT 高性能聚合物可永久承受极端的温度波动和高腐蚀性介质，且不会发生分子降解。
industrie.bento2Desc: 同质焊接连接消除了密封件这一弱点。一个不可分割的、压力稳定的网络，实现最大的运行可靠性。
industrie.bento3Desc: 可抵抗数百种强酸、强碱和溶剂。非常适合化学工艺工程和半导体生产。
industrie.bento4Desc: 通过材料固有的隔音性能和厚壁，显著降低水流噪音和水锤效应。
industrie.section2Lead: 透过表面可以发现为什么 K-Aqua 被指定用于世界上最关键的基础设施。
industrie.scroll1Desc: 我们在德国的生产设施使用激光测量系统，实时监控壁厚和直径。任何超出微观公差的偏差都会导致立即自动拒收。这种绝对的尺寸精度保证了施工现场完美的焊接结果。
industrie.scroll2Desc: 与机械连接或粘合剂系统不同，我们的管道和管件在分子水平上融合。过渡区域实际上变得比管道本身更坚固。这消除了传统系统中由于振动、压力激增或材料老化引起的泄漏风险。
industrie.scroll3Desc: 我们的纤维复合管道（纤维技术）在核心集成了特殊的玻璃纤维层。与标准塑料管道相比，这可使热线膨胀降低多达 75%，从而极大地减少了所需的紧固点数量，并彻底改变了管道静力学。
industrie.scroll4Desc: 对于食品、制药和半导体行业的应用，我们提供完全具有毒理学安全性的系统。根据最严格的国际标准，没有重金属浸出，没有微生物腐蚀 (MIC)，并且气味和味道绝对中性。
industrie.timelineLead: 从最初的规划阶段到数十年免维护运行——我们将在每个关键阶段陪伴您的项目。
industrie.timeline1Desc: 我们的工程团队利用 BIM 数据、压力损失计算和膨胀分析为您的专业规划人员提供支持，以实现最大的规划可靠性。
industrie.timeline2Desc: 复杂的歧管和组件在理想条件下于我们的工厂以毫米级精度进行预制，经过测试后准时交付到施工现场。
industrie.timeline3Desc: 得益于重量轻和快速的共熔技术，与金属系统相比，安装时间最多可缩短 50%。
industrie.timeline4Desc: 压力测试和冲洗。系统可立即完全恢复。粘合剂无需固化时间，无需进行防腐处理。
industrie.timeline5Desc: 虽然金属系统需要持续的维护和腐蚀监测，但 K-Aqua 可以完全免维护地运行 50 年以上。
industrie.section3Title: 通过了超越断裂点的测试。
industrie.section3P1: 在 K-Aqua 系统获得全球市场批准之前，它在我们内部测试实验室中经历了在现实世界中永远不会发生的严酷场景测试。
industrie.section3P2: 我们模拟极端水锤效应、延时过程中的加速热老化、超过 100 bar 的爆破压力测试，以及 95°C 下数千小时的连续负载测试。只有毫发无损地度过这场考验，才配得上 德国工程 的称号。
industrie.ctaTitle: 确保您的下一个大型项目安全无虞。
industrie.ctaDesc: 我们的工程师随时准备为您的工业厂房配置关键基础设施的尺寸。不要依赖猜测。建立在 K-Aqua 之上。

trinkwasser.metaDesc: K-Aqua 饮用水 – 通过德国工程为全球大型项目提供毫不妥协的安全保障。
trinkwasser.heroDesc: 毫不妥协的卫生标准、无与伦比的使用寿命以及绝对的耐腐蚀性。K-Aqua PP-R 管道系统为输送我们最重要的食物设定了终极全球标准。
trinkwasser.section1Lead: 在为特大城市、医院和大型工业项目提供饮用水时，'足够'永远不够。我们建造永恒的基础设施。
trinkwasser.section1P1: 水不仅仅是一种资源；它是文明的基础。输送水的管道系统是我们城市无形的神经系统。该系统出现故障意味着不仅仅是经济损失 - 它是关键基础设施的故障。
trinkwasser.section1P2: 这就是为什么在 K-Aqua，我们奉行基于 零缺陷容忍度 前提的工程方法。传统金属或复合材料系统具有计算出的衰减时间（腐蚀、结垢、密封疲劳），而我们的 PP-R 和 PP-RCT 系统通过其基本的物理和化学性质消除了这些影响。
trinkwasser.section1P3: 同质聚变焊接意味着该网络不是由数千个独立部件组成的，而是由单个连续的大分子组成。这是 德国工程 的精髓：设计的系统不仅今天有效，而且在 50 年后，它仍将具有与投入使用时完全相同的水力和卫生特性。
trinkwasser.section2Lead: K-Aqua 系统的优势不在于表面特征，而在于其深厚的材料特定设计。
trinkwasser.scroll1Desc: 我们的饮用水系统由高分子量聚丙烯无规共聚物制成。大分子结构保证了对侵蚀性水质和化学添加剂的绝对惰性。管道在微观层面上不与流动介质相互作用，从物理上排除了分子层面上任何颗粒的迁移或饮用水污染。
trinkwasser.scroll2Desc: 忘记 O 型圈、密封件或机械压接连接。我们的系统基于同质材料融合（多重融合）。管材和管件在 260°C 下融合成一个单一的、不可分离的物理单元。结果是一个完美的同质管道系统，在连接处没有潜在的薄弱环节。没有密封件的地方，就不会有密封件失效。
trinkwasser.scroll3Desc: 我们的管道系统如镜面般光滑的内表面（粗糙度 k = 0.007 毫米）使微生物和生物膜无处附着。这消除了军团菌形成和细菌生长的风险。加上绝对的不透明度，微生物污染的风险被降至绝对最低，使该系统成为医院和高度敏感基础设施的首选。
trinkwasser.scroll4Desc: 几十年来，金属管道会经历逐渐腐蚀和结垢的过程，这会缩小横截面并大大增加压力损失。K-Aqua 系统在其超过 50 年的整个使用寿命内都保留了其初始的水力横截面。泵的性能保持恒定，避免了气蚀，基础设施的运营成本 (OPEX) 完全保持在计算的水平。
trinkwasser.section3Lead: 根据最严格的全球标准（DIN、EN、ISO、DVGW、SKZ）获得认证，K-Aqua 在所有关键 KPI 方面均提供了可衡量的卓越性能。
trinkwasser.bento1Desc: 虽然金属不可避免地会与水和氧气发生反应，但 PP-R 仍然完全呈惰性。没有点蚀，没有生锈，没有介质污染。
trinkwasser.bento2Desc: 在标准操作条件下（20°C / 10 bar），该系统经认证使用寿命超过 50 年。这对应于现代房地产的计算使用寿命。
trinkwasser.bento3Desc: 聚丙烯的高密度和弹性可高效吸收水流噪音和压力激增（水锤）。结果是运行非常安静，非常适合高级酒店。
trinkwasser.bento4Desc: 该系统的导热率仅为 0.24 W/mK，可最大程度地减少冷凝和热量损失。与铜管或钢管相比，它需要的外部隔热材料要少得多。
trinkwasser.bento5Desc: 我们的高性能管道（SDR 6 / PN 25）可承受巨大的工作压力和峰值温度。专为摩天大楼的立管和高压系统设计。
trinkwasser.bento6Title: 食品安全及毒理学无害
trinkwasser.bento6Desc: 不含重金属、增塑剂或有毒添加剂。PP-R 符合最高的国际饮用水标准，不会影响水的味道或气味。
trinkwasser.bento7Desc: K-Aqua 持续受到独立测试机构的监控。SKZ、WRAS 以及许多其他机构证实了我们生产一贯且毫不妥协的优质品质。
trinkwasser.timelineLead: 从原材料到数十年的使用：K-Aqua 管道系统生命周期中的每一步都受到严格的质量协议的约束。
trinkwasser.timeline1Desc: 选择最高纯度的颗粒（北欧化工 / 沙特基础工业公司）。在 K-Aqua 测试实验室对每批货物的分子量分布和熔融指数 (MFI) 进行认证控制。
trinkwasser.timeline2Desc: 在最先进的、由计算机控制的 KraussMaffei 挤出机上进行加工。在此过程中进行的超声波壁厚测量可确保尺寸公差在微米范围内。
trinkwasser.timeline3Desc: 在洁净室条件下全自动生产系统组件。由抗脱锌黄铜 (DZR) 制成的金属螺纹嵌件以贴合且防扭转的方式包覆成型。
trinkwasser.timeline4Desc: 每个生产批次都要在 95°C 下经受超过 1000 小时的破坏性爆破压力测试和蠕变内压测试。只有 100% 完美的批次才被允许全球出口。
trinkwasser.timeline5Desc: 由认证的焊接技术人员在现场进行安装。同质聚变创造了一个没有机械弱点的无尽系统。最终的压力测试验证了整个网络的整体安全性。
trinkwasser.section4P1: 真正的工程学体现在完美细节的总和中。我们的尺寸范围从最后一英里的 20 毫米到庞大的主供水管线的 160 毫米。每个元件都精确地针对系统架构进行了定制。
trinkwasser.section4P2: 无论是 80 层摩天大楼中的立管、工业冷却循环中复杂的配水管网，还是诊所中高度敏感的饮用水供应——K-Aqua 系统世界都能为每一项水力挑战提供精确、经过认证的解决方案。
trinkwasser.ctaDesc: 与我们的工程团队谈谈您的下一个大型项目。我们不仅提供管道，我们还提供系统安全。
